findings.detail: nel-001: agents/nel/security gitignore gap — persists across 6+ healthchecks. Zero real remediation. Sim-ack'd but never actually fixed.

No newsletter produced for 2026-04-12 OR 2026-04-13. 48+ hours without output. flag-nel-003 raised at 22:10Z, auto-remediation delegated to ra-003, but Cowork sandbox cannot execute pipeline. Requires interactive Mini session.
sam-001: /api/hq?action=data returning HTTP 401. Persists since 21:36Z on 04-13. HQ dashboard data reads broken. Sim-ack'd, not fixed.
Sim-ack masking pattern: 20+ tasks in Kai ACTIVE.md show DELEGATED — sim-report: all clear but underlying issues remain open. False-green state persists.
flag-aether-001 logged 21+ times in last 2 hours (triple-logged every 15-min cycle). No dedup. Log pollution accelerating.
flag-nel-002: Sentinel found 2 projects with test failures. Flagged at 22:10Z.
flag-nel-004: 15 broken documentation links. Nel self-delegated fix (nel-003).
Queue completed jobs reference stale session paths that no longer resolve. Queue functional but remediation commands are no-ops.

root_cause: Cowork sandbox cannot execute on the Mini. All delegated tasks confirm agent reachability via sim-ack but never perform real remediation. Requires interactive Kai session on Mini with queue worker access.
